series_metadata.series_description: Documents and records relating to the bond transaction (including the trust indenture, loan agreements, bond counsel opinion, bank statements, Official Statements), Documentation evidencing expenditure of bond proceeds; managment contracts and research agreements; Documentation evidencing all sources of payment or security for the bonds.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain as long as the bonds are outstanding, plus 3 years after the final redemption date of the bonds. ; Electronic: Transfer to Electronic Media. Retain onsite for as long as the bonds are outstanding, plus 3 years after the final redemption date of the bonds., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
